name: Crella's Crozier
description:
Active: Rite of Rumusque

You enter ghost form for %duration% seconds, becoming immune to physical damage, but are unable to attack and %extra_spell_damage_percent%%% more vulnerable to magic damage.

Steal %movespeed_steal_pct%%% movement speed from enemy heroes in %active_radius% range every second. Movement speed steal lasts %stack_duration%s.

Putrefaction Aura's effect is increased to %active_health_steal%%%. All of the lost Health Restoration is redirected to you every second.

Passive: Putrefaction Aura

Reduces nearby enemy heroes' Health Restoration by %health_steal%%%.

Radius: %radius%
notes: Ghost form ends if you become Debuff Immune and will have no effect if you are already Debuff Immune.
Shares cooldown with Ghost Scepter and its upgrades.
Putrefaction Aura does not redirect Health Restoration from enemy heroes that are at full health.
